subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, free from the taint of extinction and decay, befitteth the most holy and exalted court of the Eternal One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از شائبه فنا و زوال ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت لایزالی را لایق و سزاست که
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the power of words; of speech, @consolation and comfort
